#+TITLE: Drawer Edge Cases

* Properly placed property drawer
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: proper-1
:CUSTOM_ID: proper
:END:
Body text.

* Property drawer with planning line
SCHEDULED: <2024-01-15 Mon>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: with-planning
:END:

* Property drawer with DEADLINE
DEADLINE: <2024-02-01 Thu>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: with-deadline
:END:

* Property drawer with both
SCHEDULED: <2024-01-15 Mon> DEADLINE: <2024-02-01 Thu>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: with-both
:END:

* Misplaced property drawer (blank line between)

:PROPERTIES:
:ID: misplaced-blank
:END:

* Misplaced property drawer (text between)
Some text before the drawer.
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: misplaced-text
:END:

* Multiple properties to align
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: multi
:CUSTOM_ID: my-section
:CATEGORY: testing
:ARCHIVE: archive.org::
:LOGGING: nil
:END:

* Single property (no alignment needed)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: single
:END:

* Duplicate CUSTOM_ID (lint error)
:PROPERTIES:
:CUSTOM_ID: duplicate-id
:END:

** Sub-heading with same CUSTOM_ID
:PROPERTIES:
:CUSTOM_ID: duplicate-id
:END:

* Custom drawers
:LOGBOOK:
CLOCK: [2024-01-15 Mon 09:00]--[2024-01-15 Mon 10:30] =>  1:30
CLOCK: [2024-01-14 Sun 14:00]--[2024-01-14 Sun 15:45] =>  1:45
:END:

* Nested drawers (invalid per spec)
:RESULTS:
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: nested-invalid
:END:
:END:

* Empty property drawer
:PROPERTIES:
:END:

* Property drawer with empty value
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:
:CUSTOM_ID:
:END:

* File-level properties (before any heading)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: file-level
:END:

* Drawer-like text in body
The text :PROPERTIES: is not a drawer when not at line start.
Also :END: is just text here.

* Unclosed drawer
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: unclosed
